description:
In 2006, I had the opportunity to join NYC Sandhog Union 147, working in mining and tunneling. Back then, safety practices were minimal, and the culture around workplace safety was not a priority. However, over the years, I witnessed a significant shift—new safety regulations were introduced, management became more engaged, and a stronger emphasis was placed on safe work practices. As a result, injuries decreased, and work became more efficient.

Recognizing this transformation, I felt inspired to be part of the movement. In 2016, I founded “I AM” EHS Management LLC with the goal of contributing to the workforce and supporting businesses in creating safer, more effective work environments.

FortyLove is a leading photo and video production company, proudly certified as a Minority and Women-Owned Business Enterprise (MWBE) by both New York State and New York City. Based in NYC, we specialize in producing high-quality visual content for both commercial brands and government clients. With a team of experienced professionals, we deliver exceptional work across various industries including fashion, lifestyle, real estate, healthcare, technology, and public sector projects.

At FortyLove, we’re storytellers at heart, bringing creativity, technical skill, and innovation to every project we undertake. Our services span from concept development through post-production, ensuring that we provide an end-to-end solution for all visual production needs. We have earned the trust of globally recognized brands and government agencies by consistently delivering compelling content with a commitment to quality, professionalism, and inclusivity.

MWBE Certification

As an MWBE-certified company, FortyLove is committed to supporting diversity and inclusion in the workforce. This certification allows us to participate in government contracting opportunities, where MWBE engagement is prioritized, and enables clients to meet their diversity goals. We ensure that every project not only reflects high standards of craftsmanship but also promotes equitable representation, both in front of and behind the camera.

Our Services

FortyLove offers a wide range of photo and video production services, catering to the unique needs of commercial and government clients. Our expertise extends to various types of projects, including branding campaigns, public service announcements, product shoots, corporate events, and more. Below are our primary service offerings:

1. Commercial Photo and Video Production
We work with brands across industries to create visually stunning content that enhances their message and engages their target audience. Our commercial services include:

Advertising Campaigns: Creating eye-catching visuals that build brand awareness.
Product Photography & Videography: Highlighting product features and quality for marketing purposes.
Corporate Videos: Producing company profiles, testimonials, and internal communication content.
Event Coverage: Documenting key moments at corporate events, launches, and trade shows.
Social Media Content: Generating dynamic visuals optimized for social platforms.
Fashion & E-commerce Photography: Crafting professional lookbooks and product images that drive sales.
2. Government Photo and Video Production
FortyLove is experienced in working with government agencies to produce content that meets strict compliance and quality standards. Our government services include:

Public Service Announcements (PSAs): Communicating important messages to the public.
Training Videos: Creating instructional content for employees and the public.
Documentary Production: Capturing critical social, political, and environmental issues.
Infrastructure Documentation: Recording the progress of public works and infrastructure projects.
Event Documentation: Providing professional coverage of government events and initiatives.
Emergency Response & Preparedness Videos: Helping public safety departments communicate important guidelines.
As a certified MWBE, we ensure all diversity and inclusion goals are met in compliance with state and federal regulations, making us an ideal partner for government contracting.

3. End-to-End Production Services
We offer comprehensive production services that cover every aspect of a project, from pre-production planning to final delivery. Our full-service capabilities include:

Pre-Production: Creative development, budgeting, casting, location scouting, and permitting.
Production: On-set photography and videography, drone filming, and live-streaming.
Post-Production: Professional editing, sound design, color grading, motion graphics, and VFX.
We also handle all necessary compliance, ensuring that each project meets regulatory standards, particularly in the case of government contracts or productions involving minors.

4. Specialized Services
Multilingual Content: We produce content in various languages, ensuring it resonates with diverse audiences.
Green Production: Offering eco-friendly production practices for clients focused on sustainability.
Government Contracting: Our expertise in public sector work and MWBE certification makes us a trusted partner for government agencies.

My name is PercyLee Anderson, I`m the middle child of five siblings. I was born in the early 60`s during the end of the civil rights movement. I grew up in a time when children respected and greeted their elders. Values, Courtesy, Manners and Respect were a way of life.  It was a set of standards, that were passed down, taught, given and shared from generation to generation.  We were hit with two epidemics in the 80`s, Crack and HIV. A generation got lost, and along with that Values, Courtesy, Manners and Respect were lost too, but not for all.  A negative environment arose through the 80`s, 90`s, into the present and spread from the young to the old.  Me and a partner would discuss issues concerning the values and how they were lost and how they needed to be revived and brought back.  We wrote a few books, that covered some of these issues.  Then after a few years, I sat down and continued to write more on the basic with my first publication, People Learning Everyday Etiquette. Just to get people ( young and old) thinking and behaving in a correct manner. Then I decided to go deeper, it wasn`t just how people acted, it was on how some thought, and like I said from the young to the old.  That’s when I wrote, Positive Learning Equates Etiquette. It’s not only teaching, its reteaching, it`s directing and redirecting, it`s suggesting a better choice and lifestyle that once was, could be again for all. Soft Skills Training. Book Author. NYC Borough Map T-shirts. Personal Etiquette and Manners Books your youth and adults.

“All Black Errythang” is a powerful anthology of concise yet impactful poems that celebrate Black history, culture, hair, names, and the beauty of African American Vernacular English (AAVE). Additionally, the collection features poems related to Juneteenth history and other pressing social justice themes. Part of the United States Library of Congress Collection and the renowned Schomburg Center for Research in Black Culture, this anthology holds both inspiration and historical significance.

Accompanied by an action and discussion guide, “All Black Errythang” encourages readers to engage deeply with the material. This workbook poses thought-provoking questions and actionable steps, transforming readers from passive consumers of literature into active learners and advocates. "All Black Errythang” is a literary masterpiece that connects readers to Black voices, inspires introspection, and empowers them to contribute to a more inclusive world.
-------------
Chanel Murray, M.Ed, is an educator, literacy specialist, writer, keynote speaker and advocate for equity. She is the author of All Black Errythang Poems and All Black Errythang a Discussion and Action Guide. She is the co-founder and director of Black Gems-an empowering program that provides children and adults of the African diaspora with an opportunity to learn Black history from an African centered lens. Whether it's STEM, the arts, or education, the core of her work centers around addressing systemic barriers. 

Contact ABErrythang@gmail.com for speaking engagements and programming. 

Speaking topics:
-All Black Errythang, unpacking the poems together
-Juneteenth: Freeish since 1865
-Beyond Boundaries: Overcoming Self-Imposed Limits for Unforeseen Outcomes

Arnie and Ebony Catering LLC is a black owned women based business that started twenty years ago, where 2 sisters cooked out of our town house in Harlem,NY. We became Arnie and Ebony Catering LLC in December 2019. The following June we took a leap of faith and purchased our Food Truck during the height of the pandemic with our savings. We cook many different types of food, but mainly we specialize in Soul food and Seafood. The menu consists of Fried Chicken, Fried Fish, Fried shrimp, Turkey wings, BBQ Ribs, Roast Pork, Baked Macaroni and Cheese, Collard Greens, Candied Yams, Potato Salad, and Spanish rice with peas. We continue to serve our community in Harlem with our delicious food. We are apart of the Masc Hospitality family, where we participate in the Uptown Night Market, Bronx Night Market, Harlem Bazaar for the past 2 years, and Marcus Samuelson Harlem Eatup. This means that food service establishments, stores, manufacturers, etc may not possess, sell, or offer single service expanded polystyrene (EPS) foam service articles or loose packaging.  Across New York, Businesses are becoming increasingly fearful that this will raise costs unnecessarily. However, at Bamboo Yoshi, it is our duty to be socially conscious while reducing the carbon footprint on the environment all without causing our clients significantly higher expenses.  
Bamboo Yoshi can supply businesses with alternative packaging solutions and compliant-ready "take-out" containers that are cost-effective as well as environmentally friendly.  At Bamboo Yoshi, we offer sustainable packaging, biodegradable bagasse, and other eco-friendly products. business_name: Bara Ex Nihilo Holdings, LLC ( BENH)
description:
Bara Homes, a division of Bara Ex Nihilo Holdings, LLC, is a SBA-certified firm, an Economically Disadvantaged Woman-Owned Small Business (EDWOSB), and a Port Authority of New York & New Jersey (PANYNJ) certified firm under the JMSBE Program, qualifying for contracts up to $2 million annually. We specialize in residential construction, affordable housing development, and facility maintenance, delivering high-quality, sustainable, and cost-effective solutions while ensuring compliance with local, state, and federal regulations.

Core Functions:
Affordable Housing Development & Rehabilitation

Constructing and restoring residential properties to support low- and moderate-income housing initiatives.
Partnering with government agencies, private developers, and nonprofit organizations to expand housing accessibility.
General Contracting & Construction Management

Overseeing construction projects from planning to execution, ensuring compliance with building codes, zoning laws, and safety standards.
Managing subcontractors, budgeting, and scheduling to deliver efficient and timely project execution.
Facility Maintenance & Property Services

Providing building upkeep, janitorial services, and operational management for residential and commercial properties.
Ensuring properties remain in compliance with housing codes, safety regulations, and sustainability standards.
Public Sector Contracting & Compliance

Engaging in SBA 8(a), WOSB/EDWOSB, and JMSBE procurement programs, bidding on contracts related to housing, construction, and facility maintenance.
Collaborating with government agencies, prime contractors, and developers to meet small business utilization goals.
As a Port Authority JMSBE-certified firm, qualified to bid on contracts up to $2 million annually within PANYNJ projects.
Sustainability & Smart Housing Solutions

Integrating LEED-certified, energy-efficient, and environmentally sustainable practices into construction and rehabilitation projects.
Implementing green building materials, renewable energy systems, and water conservation solutions to align with federal and state sustainability initiatives.
Community & Workforce Development

Creating job opportunities through local hiring, workforce training programs, and apprenticeship initiatives.
Engaging with community stakeholders and policymakers to ensure developments align with long-term economic and housing goals.
Commitment to Excellence
As an SBA-certified firm, EDWOSB, and JMSBE-certified contractor, Bara Homes is dedicated to quality craftsmanship, economic empowerment, and sustainable growth. Through strategic partnerships with government agencies, private sector stakeholders, and the Port Authority of NY & NJ, we continue to enhance communities and create equitable housing and infrastructure opportunities..

description:
Black House Group Inc. is a women and minority owned event production agency founded by two college besties who share a passion for producing events and curating experiences.  Our full service event production agency can manage all aspects of  your event, or provide specific services in collaboration with your event planning team.  We specialize event management, technical direction, brand activations, set design, stage management, and onsite production support.

DIVERSE EXPERTISE 
We not only celebrate diversity we seek it. Our boutique agency operates with a small full time team and a vast extended tribe working on contracts matched to each event based on experience.  We live for our craft and seek out others who invest the same passion and energy into their work as we do. We flex our team – up and down – as needed to ensure that we bring the right experience at the right time to maximize your budget. Our rigorous process and extensive network of event professionals affords our clients with access to the best-in-the-biz all coordinated under one vision – one plan. We grind in the background and enable you to focus on your attendees, clients, press and sponsors.


AUTHENTIC COLLABORATION
Strong communication is one of our hallmarks and it begins with listening.  You call us for reason, and we take the time to talk over all your desires and fears to learn precisely what we can provide to help you succeed. We work back from a BIG picture to ensure all possible costs are accounted for.  To begin, we delve into your mission and vision for the event so that we can align our creative plan to your brand and ethos of your organization’s culture. We take the time to understand what makes you authentically… you. We learn your event objectives and pinpoint potential road-blocks in the event production.  

PRECISE BUDGETING 
Fiscal responsibility is at the forefront of all our projects. Mindful budget planning and financial discipline ensures no overages. Once we establish a budget, we are limited only by our imagination. 

BESPOKE EXPERIENCES 
Our designers craft ways to visualize your message and engage guests in experiences that depict your mission. We turn four blank walls into memorable, immersive experiences. Together we will create the environment and experience you envision.

TECHNOLOGY DRIVEN 
Our forward thinking tribe of designers and producers utilize technology and innovative solutions scaled to your budget to make your event unique.  

STAGE DESIGN 
Our trendsetting designers will set the tone of your event with custom stage designs and captivating scenic installations. 

STAGE MANAGEMENT 
Our skilled stage management team runs smooth and stress-free programs and shows.  Whether it is simple remarks on a small stage, or a full blown concert - we will make sure everything is executed on schedule as planned.  

STREAMLINED SERVICES 
Let us streamline event production services to make your life simpler!  We can manage all aspects of your event, or provide a single service such as technical direction and drafting.  Our team will assist wherever you need a hand, and will take lead on the elements you would like to “off-load”. 

EVENT MANAGEMENT 
Our team will manage all the moving pieces onsite and allow you to stay focused on your attendees. Each event builds on a deep foundation of learning from past events. We present a formal recap to provide meaningful lessons for your future events.

Borkor Psychotherapy Services, PLLC, is a private practice and wellness advisory firm of licensed psychotherapists. Our team of culturally competent mental health professionals is dedicated to helping individuals, families, students, teachers, school administrators, corporations, and employees. We aim to inspire positive change through our social and emotional learning (SEL) health and wellness professional development and our mentoring and counseling services.
 
Our SEL Wellness Initiative is currently in practice and thriving within 2 DOE schools, including Mental and Emotional Wellness Professional Development Direct Services.
 
 Borkor Psychotherapy Services will provide a wellness program that focuses on improving the well-being of both students and staff or employers and employees through a wellness partnership with your school/organization. We aim to create a healthy and supportive school or corporate community where students, staff, and employees feel valued and secure and can develop a growth mindset in a safe environment. We will work towards achieving this by developing and implementing a comprehensive wellness intervention program.
 
Borkor Psychotherapy Services, PLLC - Commodities and Services include but aren’t limited to:
 
1. Direct Mental Health Services:
- Individual Counseling: Personalized one-on-one therapy sessions addressing specific mental health issues.
- Group Counseling: Therapy sessions conducted with multiple individuals facing similar challenges to foster peer/colleague support.
- Adolescent Support Groups: Targeted group therapy for students from challenging environments, emphasizing resilience and empowerment.
 
2. Professional Development and Training:
- Monthly Advisory Sessions: Bi-monthly sessions focusing on social and emotional learning (SEL), mental health awareness, and wellness strategies.
- Restorative Conversations for Mediation: Facilitated discussions to resolve conflicts and promote restorative justice within schools and organizations.
Compassion Fatigue and Caregiver Burnout Workshops: These training sessions
help staff and caregivers manage stress and prevent burnout.
Peer-to-Peer Mediation Training: This training empowers students with the skills to mediate conflicts among their peers, fostering a collaborative school environment.
 
3. Wellness Programs:
Comprehensive Wellness Intervention Programs: Tailored programs for schools and organizations that focus on improving the overall well-being of students and staff.
- Individual and Group Mentorship Services: Providing guidance and support through mentorship, promoting personal and professional growth.
 
4. Collaborative Initiatives:
- Wellness Partnerships: Collaborating with schools and organizations to implement wellness programs that foster a healthy, supportive community.
- Program Evaluation and Adaptation: Regular assessments of wellness programs to ensure effectiveness and continuous improvement based on feedback.
 
5. Long-term Sustainability Efforts:
- Setting Personal Wellness Goals: Encouraging participants to set and track progress on personal wellness goals.
- Promoting Growth Mindset: Fostering a mindset that embraces challenges and continuous improvement among staff and students.
- Culture of Well-being: Establishing and maintaining a supportive school culture that prioritizes mental and emotional well-being.
 
By providing these services and programs, Borkor Psychotherapy Services, PLLC aims to create a lasting positive impact on individuals’ and communities’ mental and emotional health, promoting resilience, empowerment, and a supportive environment for growth and development.

Bradford Edwards & Varlack LLP performs as a business advisory organization rather than a traditional law firm. We recognize that clients’ problems are layered and require integrated solutions whether they are legal, commercial, financial, or their liberty is at risk. We have assembled a diverse team with different talents, experiences and skills who stand ready to tackle clients’ problems. We are obsessed with winning, and aggressively advocate for our clients
through rigorous analysis balanced against commercial, political and strategic realities.

We put our clients’ interests first. We set clear goals at the outset of an engagement and work with clients to define “success” and then deploy resources efficiently and innovatively to minimize disruption to their businesses. We offer pre-litigation counseling and advice and seek a consensual resolution, if appropriate. From the outset of each
engagement, however, we prepare as if the investigation or dispute will be resolved in an adversarial proceeding before a court, a regulatory proceeding, or an arbitration panel. We train our sights on the critical facts and issues that matter most to our clients at trial rather than pre-trial machinations to gain leverage.

Select Practice Areas:
- Insolvency and Creditor’s Rights. Our attorneys have represented creditors in Chapter 11 proceedings, including
lenders, bondholders, trade creditors and equity holders; helped distressed companies sell assets; defended creditors in fraudulent conveyance and preferential transfers actions; and investigated breach of fiduciary duty and fraud claims, as well as subordination of claims and priority disputes.
- Investigations and Government Enforcement Defense. We have deep experience representing clients in civil proceedings before federal, state and city regulatory agencies on a range of issues including antitrust, accounting restatements, fraud, and FCPA matters.
- Securities Enforcement & Regulatory. Our lawyers leverage their experience at federal and state regulatory agencies to advise clients about financial products and services litigation that accompany industrywide inquiries.
- Trials, Arbitrations and Mediation. Our lawyers have extensive litigation experience in state and federal courts nationwide.
- Employment Counseling and Litigation. We have led internal investigations, defended claims of discrimination,
sexual harassment and wrongful termination, and prepared severance agreements for clients. We also provide guidance on talent management strategies designed to mitigate risk.
- Risk and Crisis Management. Our attorneys focus on risk and crisis management to mitigate litigation and reputational risk. We advise boards of directors and management teams on reputation
management and managing public perception and help to craft clients’ media strategy.

Carter Lard Consulting (CLC) provides MWBE consulting services in all areas of compliance, risk assessment and management, HR management, cost reduction, expense management, networking and team collaboration, education, training and development, and administration. We provide workforce and subcontractor opportunities in construction and other areas of staffing. We work with federal, state and local fair labor agencies to ensure regulatory compliance, and we collaborate with community organizations to infiltrate impoverished neighborhoods. We are a network of companies and professionals who work collaboratively to provide targeted, measurable solutions to enhance MWBE growth and participation. Cassie Chris LLC: Where Art Meets Film & TV

Cassie Chris LLC, led by visionary artist and writer Cassie Chris, is a Black woman-owned business deeply rooted in Brooklyn, New York. With over a decade of experience, we specialize in blending the worlds of art, film, and TV, bringing a unique and innovative approach to both industries. Our mission is to solve the challenges of creative storytelling and artistic integration, offering services that prioritize originality, quality, and cultural resonance.

Expertise and Services:

Film & TV Industry

Script Writing and Story Development: We craft compelling scripts and storylines that resonate with audiences across film, TV, and digital media, ensuring your project stands out.
Production Management: We handle every detail of production with precision, from pre-production planning to on-set coordination, ensuring a smooth process.
Character Design and Animation: Our expertise in both traditional and digital animation brings visually stunning, emotionally engaging characters to life.

Arts & Crafts

Realistic Figure Sculptures: We create life-like sculptures that add depth to any space, ideal for public installations, private collections, or as props.
Sculptural Installations: Our large-scale installations transform spaces, creating immersive environments that evoke emotion and reflect the community.
Ceramic Art for Architectural Integration: We design custom ceramic tiles and sculpted pieces that seamlessly integrate into architectural projects, adding an artistic touch.
Outdoor Ceramic Art: Our durable ceramic pieces are perfect for outdoor installations, enhancing gardens, parks, and urban landscapes.
Illustrations: Our illustration services bring a unique visual flair to your projects, whether for print, digital media, or custom artwork.
Teaching and Mentorship:
With over seven years of experience as a teaching artist, we offer workshops and mentorship programs that inspire and educate the next generation of artists across disciplines like animation, sculpture, and creative storytelling.

Problem-Solving Through Creativity:
We understand the challenges of creating unique and personalized spaces, as well as the complexities of storytelling in the film and TV industry. By integrating high-quality craftsmanship, innovative design, and culturally resonant narratives, we ensure your vision is brought to life with precision and creativity.

Our Commitment
Cassie Chris LLC is more than just a business; it's a collaborative partner for those seeking to infuse their projects with creativity, culture, and quality. We pride ourselves on our attention to detail, adaptability to various artistic styles, and commitment to delivering exceptional results.

Our Background
Cassie Chris, the founder of Cassie Chris LLC, is a first-generation Haitian-American multidisciplinary artist and writer with a rich background in both the arts and the film and TV industry. With over 10 years of experience, Cassie has collaborated with fashion stylists, directed creative projects, and developed a wide range of skills in sculpture, animation, and digital arts. Her work has been featured in Fashion Magazine, YouTube series, New York Fashion Shows, and more.

In addition to her artistic practice, Cassie has spent over seven years mentoring young artists in New York City, teaching them the fundamentals of animation, sculpture, and creative expression. Her passion for storytelling and dedication to artistic excellence make her a valuable partner in any project.

Contact Us:
If you're looking to enhance your project with unique art, compelling narratives, and high-quality craftsmanship, Cassie Chris LLC is here to help. Let's collaborate to create something truly extraordinary that resonates with your audience and stands the test of time.

CoBro Cleaning is a dynamic and socially responsible cleaning service and cleaning products company committed to delivering top tier cleaning services while championing second chances for individuals who have paid their dues to society. Founded by Clifton and Kelvin Coker, CoBro Cleaning is dedicated to excellence in cleaning, with a focus on environmental responsibility, diverse cleaning services, and e-commerce sales of high-quality cleaning products and supplies. 

Core Competencies:
1.	Cleaning Services:
•	Steam Cleaning: Utilizing state-of-the-art equipment, we provide deep and effective steam cleaning services for various surfaces, ensuring cleanliness and sanitation.
•	Awning Cleaning: We specialize in awning cleaning, removing dirt, grime, and pollutants, enhancing the appearance of your outdoor spaces.
•	Bathroom Cleaning: Our professional team excels in bathroom cleaning, maintaining impeccable hygiene standards in commercial and residential settings.
•	Restaurant Cleaning: We offer comprehensive cleaning services tailored to the unique needs of restaurants, ensuring a clean and safe dining environment.
•	Office Cleaning: With a keen eye for detail, we provide office cleaning solutions that create a healthy and productive workspace.
•	School Cleaning: We prioritize cleanliness and safety in educational environments, delivering school cleaning services that meet strict hygiene standards.
•	Stadium and Event Cleaning: CoBro Cleaning excels in post-event cleanup, ensuring venues are spotless after large gatherings.
•	Vehicle Cleaning: From bicycles, e-bikes, trains, buses and boats to cars, our cleaning services extend to various modes of transportation, ensuring a fresh and sanitized experience.
2.	E-Commerce Cleaning Product Sales:
•	We offer a wide range of cleaning products, including microfiber cleaning cloths and cleaning solutions, available for purchase through our e-commerce platform.
•	Our cleaning products are eco-friendly and highly effective, catering to both residential and commercial clients.

Differentiators:
•	Supporting a Not-For-Profit (founded by The Coker Brothers): A portion of our product sales profits goes toward supporting a nonprofit dedicated to covering attorney fees for deserving incarcerated individuals seeking sentence reduction, as well as offering aid to students with an incarcerated parent.
•	Second Chance Employer: CoBro Cleaning is dedicated to providing employment opportunities to individuals who deserve a second chance, aligning our business with a commitment to social responsibility.
•	Environmental Responsibility: We use eco-friendly cleaning products and employ sustainable practices to minimize our environmental footprint.
•	Quality Assurance: Our highly trained and experienced cleaning professionals prioritize quality, ensuring exceptional results with every service.
•	Diverse Service Offerings: From small-scale residential cleaning to large-scale stadium and event cleanup, CoBro Cleaning offers a broad spectrum of cleaning solutions.
•	E-commerce Convenience: Customers can conveniently purchase our high-quality cleaning products online, ensuring they have access to the best tools/products for maintaining cleanliness.

The DS Coaching & Consulting Group, DSCCG, is an executive coaching and leadership development organization that specializes in empowering senior leaders and executives to unlock their full potential. We offer 1:1 leadership coaching to new and emerging leaders, leadership development training - onsite & online, group coaching and team building initiatives.

With 30+ years of experience supporting top-level leadership and backed by ICF certification, we provide a unique and impactful approach to coaching. The focus is on helping leaders navigate the complexities of leadership, improve decision-making, and enhance their overall effectiveness, resulting in more robust, capable, and confident leaders and teams.

At the core is a personalized, results-oriented methodology that caters to the unique needs of each client. Offering one-on-one executive coaching that addresses critical aspects of leadership such as strategic thinking, emotional intelligence, communication, and conflict resolution. Whether a leader is transitioning into a new role, overseeing significant organizational change, or refining their leadership style, we tailor their coaching plan to help them thrive in their specific context. By partnering with clients in a deeply customized manner, we ensure that they not only address immediate challenges, but also develop the tools and mindset needed for sustained long-term success.

One of the key differentiators of our practice is the focus on helping leaders identify and overcome blind spots. Many senior leaders reach a point where they plateau, unable to see the limitations in their approach or mindset. We offer a safe, confidential space where leaders can reflect on their performance, explore their strengths, and work through obstacles that may be holding them back. Through guided introspection and actionable feedback, we partner with clients to break through these barriers, allowing them to lead with greater confidence, clarity, and impact.

DSCCG also emphasizes leadership transitions. New leaders face unique challenges when stepping into executive roles, and our coaching helps them accelerate their success. By guiding them through the nuances of their new responsibilities, they are empowered to establish a clear vision, build strong teams, and foster the credibility needed to succeed. Our coaching process provides both the support and the accountability required for leaders to thrive in new environments, ensuring they are equipped to drive their organizations forward from day one.

In addition to one-on-one coaching, we also offer organizational leadership development programs. These programs are designed to help organizations integrate coaching as part of their broader talent development strategy. Whether through group coaching sessions, leadership workshops, or initiatives to build internal coaching capabilities, we partner with organizations to strengthen their leadership pipeline and foster a culture of continuous growth and development. We understand the dynamics of organizational success and the importance of aligning leadership development with broader business objectives, which allows us to design impactful programs that drive lasting change.

A cornerstone of our business is the 90-day executive leadership coaching program, specifically designed to support new leaders as they transition into executive positions. The program provides a structured yet adaptable framework for leadership development, focusing on key areas such as vision setting, strategic decision-making, team leadership, and fostering alignment with organizational objectives. Throughout the 90-day program we emphasize the importance of leveraging internal resources, ensuring that leaders have a support system in place to maximize their impact and sustain their success long-term.

Our approach to coaching is both practical and insightful. We guide leaders through difficult decisions, help them cultivate self-awareness, and push them to take ownership of their growth. The coaching relationship is built on trust and collaboration, with an emphasis on achieving specific, measurable outcomes. By focusing on tangible results, we ensure that clients not only develop as leaders but also deliver meaningful contributions to their organizations.

Moreover, our focus on integrating internal coaching skills within organizations highlights the long-term value DSCCG provides. Businesses recognize the importance of creating an internal coaching culture, training leaders to support each other, and embedding continuous development as part of the organizational fabric. This approach ensures that leadership growth is sustainable and that coaching benefits extend beyond individual sessions into the organization's day-to-day practices. 

Ultimately, the DS Coaching & Consulting Group is the trusted partner for leaders and organizations seeking to enhance their leadership capabilities and drive long-term success.

We partner with school systems to design solutions to evolve their teaching and learning operating framework into 21st-century STEM Education framework through transformative professional development, game-changing AI technology, and curiosity-based student focused experiences, all aligning to standards. We support our partners in providing ALL students access to a comprehensive STEM Education early, often, and everywhere. 

Our framework provides a structured and strategic pathway to prepare students not just to survive but to thrive in the rest of the 21st Century. At the heart of this framework is a Comprehensive STEM Education System (CSTEMES™) approach. This is not just a process, it’s a collaborative journey, starting with aligning or developing a STEM Integration Strategy using a five-step process to ensure unity throughout the school system. 

After learning where a school system falls within the Four Levels of STEM™ on the STEM Integration Continuum™, we work collaboratively to set the context, provide all students access to STEM experiences, upskill educators through our Design Thinking-infused Pedagogy (DTIP™) with Pdgogy.ai™, and finally, involve the community through our Collective Impact STEM Integrated Community (CISTEMIC™) model. 

Our digital platform, Pdgogy.ai, customizes curriculum through a student-focused pedagogy, helping students discover what they love, what they are good at, what the world needs, and what they can be paid for. 

Ultimately, we provide thought leadership, consulting, and dynamic solutions to educators and educational stakeholders to help school systems prepare students for work, entrepreneurship, service, and college by providing a Comprehensive STEM™ education so students can thrive in a world shaped by AI, robotics, and automation.

Generation Conscious is a sustainable laundry, cleaning, and personal care refill company redefining the future of everyday consumption. 

Our mission is to address hygiene insecurity, deliver equitable access to high quality waste-free products, end the flow of billions of single use plastic containers to landfills and oceans, and work towards an environmentally just future.  

We work with universities and property managers to place detergent sheet refill stations in convenient locations across their campuses. 

How does it work? Students and/or tenants bring refillable containers to the refill stations and purchase a month’s supply of eco-friendly detergent sheets at a time using a credit or debit card. Functionally, detergent sheets work exactly like traditional detergent, just place them in the detergent compartment of the washing machine. One per load. 
Environmentally, sheets have only essential ingredients necessary for cleaning and no excess water or single use plastic packaging, leading to a much lower carbon footprint.  Generation Conscious encourages all partner schools at minimum to cover the costs of detergent sheets for students who qualify for Pell Grants in order to insure we are addressing the issue of hygiene insecurity. In the long run, we hope to expand to other waste free solid personal care and cleaning products. We have already released our second, a toothpaste tablet.

GoodWerk Mental Health Counseling is deeply committed to offering a robust suite of services tailored to the diverse needs of our clients. At the heart of our operations is a culturally responsive approach designed to support, uplift, and empower marginalized and underserved communities. Our commitment lies in affirming individuals and communities to own their power, confidence, and voices through our diverse services ranging from mental health therapy and life coaching to professional training and counseling supervision. In creating a safe space for healing and self-expression, we specialize in providing culturally responsive care to BIPOC and LGBTQIA+ communities. 

Our services include:
● Biopsychosocial Evaluation: An essential first step for all clients, this comprehensive assessment gives us a nuanced understanding of the client's lived experiences and their relation to psychosocial stressors and challenges.
● Individual Therapy: These one-on-one sessions with a mental health professional provide a platform to explore unique challenges, identify self-determined goals, and build adaptive coping mechanisms.
● Couples Therapy: Our couples therapy provides a safe space for couples to work through relationship challenges, commitment resistance, and marriage readiness, building towards mutually agreed-upon goals.
● Family Therapy: In these sessions, families meet with a mental health professional to examine family dynamics, understand challenges in familial practices, and work towards collective goals.
● Individual or Group Supervision: Supervisees are guided towards becoming well-rounded, culturally responsive counselors in our supervision services, which are rooted in the discrimination supervision model.
● Consultation & Training: Our comprehensive consulting and training programs focus on diversity, equity, inclusion, and justice work, offering crucial support to organizations committed to supporting BIPOC and LGBTQ+ communities.
● Individual Coaching: Designed to foster self-awareness, clarity, and confidence, our one-on-one coaching sessions support clients as they navigate challenges and work towards their goals. Our coaches hold globally recognized credentials from the International Coaching Federation (ICF).

At GoodWerk, we take pride in the transformative effect of our services, which are built to make a positive difference in the lives of our clients. For further information, please visit our website at www.thisisgoodwerk.com.

Hire Breakthrough® is a premier talent development and recruitment firm specializing in full-cycle recruitment, workforce development, HR consulting, and leadership training for growing businesses, government agencies, and nonprofit organizations. With a strong focus on diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI), we help organizations build high-performing teams that drive innovation and long-term success.

Founded by Kimone Napier, a seasoned talent development leader with over 10 years of experience in recruitment, operations, and organizational development, Hire Breakthrough® takes an intentional hiring approach that prioritizes people over process. Our expertise extends across industries, including education, government, nonprofit, technology, professional services, and startups.

Our Services

1. Full-Cycle Recruitment & Talent Acquisition

We provide end-to-end hiring solutions, from job scoping to candidate placement, ensuring organizations secure top talent aligned with their mission and values. Our services include:

	•	Volume Hiring & Rapid Recruitment Solutions
	•	Recruitment Process Optimization & Employer Branding

2. Workforce Development & Career Readiness Programs

Hire Breakthrough® designs and facilitates workforce development programs tailored to emerging professionals, mid-career changers, and underrepresented job seekers. We partner with organizations to deliver custom training programs, including:
	•	Job Readiness & Skills Training

	•	DEI & Inclusive Workforce Initiatives
	•	Leadership & Professional Development Workshops

3. HR Consulting & Compliance

We support government agencies, nonprofits, and growing businesses with strategic HR consulting and compliance solutions, ensuring adherence to local, state, and federal regulations. Our services include:
	•	HR Policy Development & Compliance Audits
	•	Employee Engagement & Retention Strategies
	•	Performance Management & Organizational Culture Assessments
	•	HR Technology & Systems Implementation

4. Government Contracting & MWBE Partnerships

As a certified MWBE vendor, we collaborate with NYC agencies and corporate partners to provide hiring, HR, and workforce development solutions that support government initiatives. We offer:
	•	Government Talent Solutions & Contract Staffing
	•	HR Consulting for Public Sector Organizations
	•	Customized Workforce Development Initiatives

Why Choose Hire Breakthrough®?

1. Expertise in People-First Hiring & HR Innovation

We do more than fill jobs—we help organizations build strong, sustainable teams by integrating data-driven hiring strategies with human-centered approaches. Our team has experience advising CEOs, executive directors, and HR leaders on best-in-class hiring practices.

2. Proven Track Record in DEI & Inclusive Hiring

Our recruitment and workforce programs emphasize diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) to eliminate hiring biases and expand access to opportunities for underrepresented talent.

3. Customized Solutions for NYC Government & Agencies

We understand the complexities of government procurement and HR compliance. Our team is skilled in navigating PASSPort requirements and working with public sector agencies to develop talent strategies that align with city and state objectives.

4. MWBE-Certified & Mission-Driven

As a Minority/Women-Owned Business Enterprise (MWBE), Hire Breakthrough® is committed to equitable hiring practices and workforce solutions that uplift communities and support diverse economic growth.

Marc Norman serves on multiple boards of non profit organizations and serves as chair for the Federal Reserve's Community Advisory Council.

description:
INTELVATION's Job Placement Program is an extension of our commitment to empowering individuals and connecting them with opportunities that match their skills and aspirations. Just as we provide a platform for motivational and inspirational speakers to reach their audience, our Job Placement Program aims to bridge the gap between job seekers and potential employers, ensuring a perfect match that benefits both parties.

Program Objectives:

Identifying Strengths: We assist job seekers in recognizing their strengths, skills, and qualifications.

Enhancing Job Search Skills: We provide the necessary tools and resources to improve job search skills, including resume writing, interviewing techniques, networking, and job application strategies.

Matching Candidates: Our goal is to match job seekers with suitable employment opportunities based on their qualifications and experience.

Ongoing Support: We offer continuous support throughout the employment process, including coaching, mentoring, and feedback.

Program Components:

Career Assessments: Comprehensive assessments help identify job seekers' strengths and areas for development.

Job Search Skills Training: We provide training and support in various job search skills, ensuring candidates are well-prepared for the job market.

Employer Outreach: We establish relationships with local employers to identify job openings and connect job seekers with potential employers.

Job Matching: Based on skills, experience, and qualifications, we match job seekers with suitable employment opportunities.

Coaching and Mentoring: We offer personalized coaching and mentoring to help job seekers succeed in their new roles.

Program Delivery:

Our program is delivered through a combination of online resources, group training sessions, and one-on-one coaching and mentoring sessions. We leverage social media and online job boards to connect with both job seekers and potential employers.

Program Evaluation:

We continuously evaluate the effectiveness of our program using qualitative and quantitative measures, including participant feedback, job placement rates, and employer satisfaction surveys. This data allows us to refine and improve the program continually.

Conclusion:

INTELVATION's Job Placement Program offers a comprehensive approach to job placement, providing career assessments, job search skills training, employer outreach, job matching, and coaching and mentoring. We're dedicated to helping job seekers find suitable employment opportunities and succeed in their new roles. Whether you're a recent graduate, a mid-career professional, or someone re-entering the workforce, we're here to support you every step of the way.

Award-winning content creators Samson Styles and Tyese Carmichael-Styles have joined forces to create JayCity Enterprise, a multi-faceted media company specializing in TV/Film Production, Marketing, Branding, Development and Consultation services. Founded in 2017, the company is an umbrella for all creative endeavors, collaborations, contributions and education. 

JayCity Enterprise has three separate programs it teaches to scholars ranging from grades 4- infinity. First, is our Scripted Content Development Program that teaches students how to turn their real- life experiences into a script and then transform that script into a short film. Active participation from students teaches them how to perform in front of the camera as actors, as well as behind the scenes producers. Second, is our Documentary program that serves scholars from grades 8 - infinity. The program's objective: Give students the general introduction to the art of storytelling by way of documentaries and visual arts. Third is our Anti- Gun Violence workshop that we created based off of our award winning documentary KILLING BEEF 'Gun VIolence in the Black Community' for our scholars from grades 8 - infinity. The Student will identify with the general effects of gun violence in underserved communities. The Student will identify with people personal encounters of gun violence and its personal effects. And the mindset that causes gun violence to permeate in underserve communities. The Trainee will identify with the history and conditions that exist in underserve communities that encourages gun violence and will become better equip in critical thinking to help reduce gun violence. All of our programs help scholars to enrich personal language, background knowledge, and vocabulary through reading and communicating with others.
 
With well over three decades of individual media experience under their belts, Samson and Tyese have produced more than 100 hours of television for some of the most reputable networks including NBC, PBS, BET, FOX, Netflix and more. While Samson has most reputably served as a journalist, correspondent and producer, Tyese has been behind the scenes getting the deals done. From acquisitions to branding, casting to directing, both Samson and Tyese execute at the highest level. But it wasn’t until they started working on their independent documentary Killing Beef that they realized their power, not just as a married couple but as a force in Entertainment. Killing Beef hit the film festival circuit in 2018 and won Best Documentary at the Academy Accredited Newark International Film Festival, and in just three short months was picked up by Revolt TV. Since the network premiere of Killing Beef, Rutgers University Center for Gun Violence Research has incorporated the documentary into their program curriculum.  
 
The success and reach of Killing Beef has truly put JayCity Enterprise on the map, not only a media conglomerate but as the destination for content actualization. Now, Samson and Tyese are even more passionate about not only building their slate but seeing projects through to distribution. Currently, they are focused on unscripted and scripted content dedicated to cultural commentary. 
 
Their mission of authentic, passionate storytelling is evident in all that they do, and they are focused on providing entertainment with heart and integrity that will impact audiences around the world!

KACE World, LLC, is a boutique, full-service firm that provides legal, DEI consulting, training and strategic planning services to government, businesses, and non-profit organizations.  We help you to create systems that will support your organizational growth, improve employee effectiveness, and foster a diverse, inclusive, and high-performance culture.

We help employers to mitigate potential legal liabilities which can arise from employee misconduct.  We provide on-site workshops and retreats, coaching, and training on a variety of subjects including racial, gender, religious, sexual orientation, or other biases and forms of discrimination. 

Our customized training seminars and workshops provide flexible solutions tailored to organizational needs that will develop each employee to their highest potential and train managers and supervisors on  strategies for achieving organizational goals in a manner that aligns with the needs and expectations of today’s workplace.  

Our professional services include, but are not limited to diversity, equity, and inclusion initiatives; EEOC, disciplinary and administrative hearing representation; federal and state employment litigation, leadership training; executive coaching; and sexual harassment and hostile workplace intervention and training.

PROGRAMS

 	DW Solutions - DEI Initiatives 

Our diversity, equity, and inclusion (“DEI”)  services are provided through our DW Solution Programs which include workshops, executive coaching, strategic planning, human resource training, and implementation of recruitment and retention policies that will unlock the power of diversity for your organization or business. 

In today’s world, it is important to combat conscious and unconscious bias in the workforce by helping employees better understand how to interact with their peers from diverse cultures or backgrounds. Program participants will gain increased cultural competency that will  improve their communication and team building skills to create a more effective and collaborative workplace. 

The average individual does not easily perceive their own innate biases and prejudices.  They may fail to understand how seemingly innocuous statements can be perceived as culturally insensitive microaggressions, which undercut the collegiality of the workplace.   Therefore, this important training will help employees understand the nuances of language and conduct in conveying conscious and unconscious biases, recognize the negative impact that these biases can have on others, and embrace strategies for sustainable behavioral change.

Our training programs are comprehensive and interactive. They can be presented on various platforms including in person workshops, charrettes, webinars, and online classes that participants complete at their own pace.  A charrette is a facilitated session which incorporates case studies and simulations to enable participants to recognize cultural factors which might impede the effectiveness of their work.  The training sessions also employ team imagining, as a training technique.
 
Our training Modules include but are not limited to: Understanding the Basics: Diversity & Inclusion in the Workplace; Microaggressions, Conscious and Unconscious Bias; Cultural Competency; DEI Recruitment and Retention Strategies; and EEOC & Affirmative Action policies that may your impact your business practices. 

 	EEOC, Employee Disciplinary & Administrative Hearings

Our attorneys have successfully defended employers and conducted workplace investigations related to Equal Employment Opportunity Commission complaints, disciplinary hearings and NYC and NYS employment hearings for various administrative and government entities such as the City University of New York and the New York City Council. Our attorneys have significant state and federal employment litigation experience and are admitted in New York State and in the Southern and Eastern District Federal Courts.

 	Sexual Harassment Training & Investigations

Sexual harassment is unwelcome conduct of a sexual nature that limits or interferes with an individual’s ability to participate in or fulfill their employment responsibilities. Employers are increasingly being held legally responsible for the sexual misconduct of their employees. Therefore it is important that this potential liability be mitigated through adequate training of staff on acceptable and unacceptable conduct, particularly where the workforce is comprised of  individuals from multiple generations, cultures, ethnicities, genders, and sexual orientations. 

 	Leadership Training/Executive Coaching
Our consultants have over twenty years of experience in leadership training and executive coaching and hold certifications from the Academy of Management , International Coaching Federation, and the Public Relations Society of America.

Kadidja Handmade Collection makes premium quality skincare products using sustainably sourced Shea butter from West Africa. I started my business because Shea is great for skin - it moisturizes and heals. I grew up with Shea and knew its amazing qualities. I produce a small range of products in my kitchen using Shea that I buy directly from women's groups in West Africa. The products include skin salves, lip balms, soap, and even a product for dogs. My business is about more than just making the best skincare products though - I started it also because Shea is an important source of economic empowerment for women in my home community in Togo, West Africa, and it is also an important part of the natural environment. When I sell my products they deliver benefits not only to my customers but also to women in West Africa and the natural environment. 

I arrived from Burkina Faso to the USA in 2002 and brought Shea with me - Shea trees grow only in West Africa, and are the source of Shea butter and Shea oil. In the USA, I made Shea lotions for my family and often gave some away as gifts to friends. They loved it and encouraged me to start making it to sell. I started selling it at our local farmer's market, where it was also popular, and I started supplying two local boutiques. I use 100% all-natural Shea butter and Shea oil, which I have selected myself on visits to Burkina Faso, Ghana, and Togo. I know who makes it and how they make it - women's groups in villages I have visited. I add essential oils to give the Shea products added benefits for skin. In 2018, I launched my website and I sell products there, too, all across the USA. That was the same year I also became a US Citizen! I became an entrepreneur in order to earn a living doing something I love - making Shea products. I have since learned more and more about natural skin care products, attending various workshops and seminars. Shea provides and share this knowledge with my customers.


The majority of my loyal customers live in the East Village of New York City. I participate in many local bazaars and street fairs. I have also participated in fundraising events for my local public schools, where my children went to school. I have annually provided free products as part of what I call "Teacher Appre-shea-tion Day." I have also worked with my local State Assembly Member Harvey Epstein to donate products to health care workers during the COVID-19 pandemic. I am active in a variety of local initiatives to improve the parks, the community gardens, the schools, and our local businesses. 

Globally, my products contribute to a better world: women are empowered when people buy my products because I pay a sustainable price for the shea I use. Buying my products also helps protect Shea trees, which are good for the environment.

TIH hair is unprocessed human hair that has not been chemically treated. There are no permanent/semi-permanent colors, perms, or relaxers used to alter the color, texture or curl pattern of the hair. You can purchase the hair in bulk for braiding or fusion; machined weft or hand-tied for weaving. Our hair is reusable and with the proper care can last six months to a year or longer.

business_name: Law Firm of Dayrel Sewell, PLLC
description: The LAW FIRM OF DAYREL SEWELL, PLLC is a New York City based boutique law firm founded in 2012 and is a New York State & New York City certified MBE law firm. The Firm has built a reputation for excellence in the fields of litigation, intellectual property, real estate, corporation, and energy by providing dedicated, tailored service to each and every client.  The Firm provides local, national, international, government agency clients with high-quality and cost-effective services delivering successful outcomes via legal excellence and a profound commitment to an honorable practice of law.  Attorneys at the firm are licensed to practice in the states of New York, New Jersey, District of Columbia, Virginia, and Massachusetts.  The Firm’s previous and current public entity clients include the NYS Gaming Commission, NYS Rockland County Department of Health, MTA, DASNY, and NYC Department of Housing Preservation and Development (HPD).  Over the years, Managing Principal Mr. Sewell served as an Arbitrator and Hearing Officer for multiple agencies on matters ranging from licensing, pari-mutuel law, commission regulation violations, legal fee disputes, environmental and housing programs.  Mr. Sewell, as an experienced litigator, has represented clients and/or made appearances in approximately more than 200 state and federal court hearings for nearly 15 years.  He is admitted to practice in the U.S. Supreme Court, the U.S. Court of Appeals Second Circuit, U.S. Southern and Eastern District Courts of New York.  Moreover, as licensed patent attorneys, Mr. Sewell and the Firm’s other counsel have extensive legal experience in drafting and prosecuting patent and trademark applications, intellectual property licensing, consumer product advertising, and other transaction and litigation matters.  Mr. Sewell was awarded the Litigation Lawyer of the Year by USA, Finance Monthly Law Awards, selected four times as Super Lawyer NYC Metro Rising Rising Star and seven times by Top 100 National Black Lawyers, and six times as Best Litigation Attorneys in Brooklyn by Expertise.  In addition to high-caliber, experienced attorneys and a dogged work ethic, our Firm is dedicated to providing each client with an experience that is genuine, tailored, and pleasant.

Our technicians have extensive knowledge and experience in the fields of pipe welding, structural welding, ship repair structure welding, methanol plant pipe welding and ammonia plant pipe welding. M&S MECHANICAL’S MISSION
Honesty, reliability and the highest quality of work as measured by customer satisfaction form the foundation of our business’ mission. The safety of our customers and their equipment and that of our staff is our priority. That is, total customer satisfaction buttressed by safe working conditions is the driving force behind our work.

M&S MECHANICAL’S VISION
As a company our vision is to provide excellent services on a timely and cost efficient basis that exceeds our customer’s expectations. Every project entrusted to us by our customers must and will be handled with the utmost diligence and expediency with the aim of achieving the best results, again as judged by our customers. In short, our vision is to grow our business by providing top quality work that exceeds our customers’ expectations within a safe working environment and at competitive prices


M&S MECHANICAL’S PRINCIPLES
The importance of striving to achieve 100% customer satisfaction at all times is constantly stressed upon every one who works at M&S Mechanical. Toward this end, all of our technicians are appropriately trained and are fully licensed and certified by NYC, NYS and other relevant organizations/entities to perform their relevant work. We pride ourselves at being courteous and listening carefully and asking appropriate and relevant questions of our customers to determine their needs and expectations. We work being informed by the principle that our customers are not dependent upon us but rather that we are dependent upon our customers. Hence all efforts are put into giving our customers the best.

It will be our company’s great honor to work with you toward the fruition of your vision. Please accept our appreciation in advance.

Born in Ethiopia from parents of Eritrean descent, Makina Cafe founder Eden G. Egziabher was raised amidst a vibrant mix of Ethiopian, Eritrean and Italian cultures. It’s no coincidence that “Makina” translates to “truck” in all three of these countries’ languages, whose cultures combine to create the mosaic of flavors found on the mobile cafe’s menu.
Eden prides herself on being the first Eritrean-American female entrepreneur in NYC with a food truck serving “Habesha” food. Used as a term of pride, the word “Habesha” is used to eliminate the distinction between different tribes of Eritrea and Ethiopia and celebrates the unity of people of the same region.
Tasty, healthy, nutritious and something quite unique, Makina Cafe serves up breakfast and lunch to New Yorkers that are tired of the same old take-out options. You can follow Makina Cafe (@makinacafe) on all major social media outlets to find the trucks’ location each day.

Mapp Holdings LLC: Empowering Through Education, Art, and Therapy

Introduction

Mapp Holdings LLC is a dynamic and innovative company dedicated to transforming lives through education, empowerment speaking engagements, and artistic experiences. Founded on a vision of fostering personal growth, healing, and creativity, our organization is committed to equipping youth and adults with the tools they need to navigate life's challenges successfully. At Mapp Holdings LLC, we believe in the power of knowledge, art, and therapy to inspire positive change and empower individuals to lead fulfilling lives.

Our Mission

Our primary mission at Mapp Holdings LLC is to empower individuals, especially youth and adults, by providing them with essential life skills, knowledge, and therapeutic experiences. We aim to create safe and inclusive spaces where people can grow, heal, and express themselves creatively.

Core Services

Workshops and Empowerment Speaking Engagements:
At Mapp Holdings LLC, we offer a wide range of workshops and empowerment speaking engagements designed to address various aspects of personal development and well-being. Our workshops cover topics such as conflict resolution, emotional intelligence, stress management, communication skills, and more. We invite experts in their respective fields to lead these sessions, ensuring that participants receive the highest quality education and insights.
Education from Violence Experts:
We recognize the importance of addressing violence and its impact on individuals and communities. Our organization collaborates with violence experts to provide education and resources aimed at preventing violence, fostering healthy relationships, and promoting safety. Through these programs, we work towards creating a safer and more compassionate society.
Music Paint Sip - An Artistic Journey:
As a subsidiary of Mapp Holdings LLC, Music Paint Sip combines art, music, and therapy to offer unique and therapeutic experiences. Our themed painting events are designed to unleash creativity and promote self-expression. Participants are guided by live artists who help them create beautiful artwork while enjoying music and a supportive atmosphere. These events have proven to be both enjoyable and therapeutic for our diverse clientele.
Clientele

Mapp Holdings LLC has had the privilege of serving a wide range of clients, including corporations and educational institutions throughout New York City. Our workshops and speaking engagements have been well-received by schools, businesses, community organizations, and government agencies. Our Music Paint Sip events have provided a unique and engaging experience for individuals and groups seeking a creative outlet.

The Therapist Behind It All

At the heart of Mapp Holdings LLC is our founder and owner, a licensed marriage and family therapist. With a deep understanding of human behavior, mental health, and interpersonal dynamics, our owner brings a wealth of knowledge and expertise to our programs. This background in therapy informs our approach to empowerment and healing, ensuring that our services are not only educational but also deeply therapeutic.

Impact and Vision

Over the years, Mapp Holdings LLC has touched the lives of countless individuals, equipping them with valuable skills, fostering creativity, and promoting emotional well-being. Our vision for the future is to continue expanding our reach and impact, reaching even more people in need of empowerment, education, and healing. We aspire to be a beacon of hope and a catalyst for positive change in the lives of those we serve.

Conclusion

Mapp Holdings LLC stands as a testament to the transformative power of education, art, and therapy. We are committed to making a difference in the lives of youth and adults alike, helping them navigate life's challenges with confidence and resilience. Through our workshops, empowerment speaking engagements, and Music Paint Sip events, we aim to inspire individuals to unlock their full potential and lead happier, healthier lives. With a dedicated team and a passion for positive change, we look forward to continuing our mission of empowerment and transformation in the years to come.

Strategic Human Resource Consulting: We provide strategic human resource expertise based on your unique value proposition and business goals.

Organizational Capability: Build sustainable organizational structures aligned to the strategy and future direction of your organization. Effectively manage your workforce through the strategic planning and management of talent.

Professional Development: We help identify and assess the critical knowledge, skills, and abilities organizations need to invest in to accelerate success.

Coaching: As your organization grows, evolves, and expands their competitive offerings, it is pivotal for the talent to develop and build capabilities simultaneously. We develop leaders from the inside out, which not only results in high performance, but also cultivates social intelligence in the workplace. Our coaching process is collaborative, empowering, creative, thought-provoking, goal-oriented, and future focused based on ICF Standards and Core Competencies. •Executive Coaching: Already in the C-Suite or aspire to be? Received feedback you need to develop your executive presence, assert your influence and power? business_name: Mind Meets Movement Counseling Services, PLLC
description:
Katiuscia Gray was raised in Hollis Queens New York. Raised in a Haitian household by her grandparents and aunts and cousins. Chaos and trauma were a bit part of her life. Childhood sexual abuse, domestic violence and abandonment was a tremendous part of her earlier years. That trauma was stored not just in her mind but in her body also, which made her anxious, angry, hypervigilant always ked up and on edge.

All of this hurt and pain sent her on a journey to try to heal herself and her community since so many people where just like her. She got a degree in Social work and then became a licensed clinical social worker, LCSW-R. During this time, she got married and had children. The stress of working and being married and having young children and never really fully healing from all of her traumas transitioned into headaches and gut issues. After ruling out medical issues, at the recommendation of her doctor she took her first yoga class and loved it. She loved it so much that she went for a yoga teacher certification in 2018. It was then that Mind Meets Movement counseling services, PLLC was developed. A Holistic mental health practice that incorporates a number of healing modalities including breath work, mindfulness, cognitive behavior therapy, play therapy, trauma therapy and light yoga moves, so patients can get the most out of their therapy sessions. Mind Meets Movement Counseling Services mission and passion is there is more than one way to heal. And we cannot heal the mind without incorporating the body. Proudly the private practice services children, adolescents, young adults and adults.

BeadOrama: is the heart of O!cademy as it is the perfect blend of the founders passion for education and entrepreneurship.  Students with disabilities make up a little over fifteen percent of NYC’s student population.  Incorporating the use of beads as another tool for instructing SWD’s is an innovative and enjoyable approach.  Bead crafting encourages student choice processed by their own creativity.  In addition to supporting their cognitive and fine motor skills.  Using beads in the classroom aids in mnemonics such as: counting beads, following patterns and product repetition.  Beading is a great way to engage SWD’s through creativity and hands-on production.  This program is designed to help students build tangible items that reflect their interests using various beads and stones in an array of colors and sizes. Teaching students with disabilities the skill of beading and how to turnkey their creations into a product lays the foundation of entrepreneurship in the future.

description:
The Company
This company was founded to help people purchase homes in NYC. The President Jamaal Patterson researched grants to help Low to Medium income (LMI) house holds purchase properties. This transition into consulting and real estate brokerage services. 
The Ownership
The company will be structured as a corporation.. 
The Management
Flat Organizational with a holacracy management style. This firm will be a Kiosk with each partner contributing ideas without centralized hierarchy. The broker and agent will provide legal documents for closing of properties. The Grant researcher will find grants and work with community partners to find clients. 
The Goals and Objectives
Research, Find, and secure grants for LMI house holds to purchase properties. Research, find and secure subsidized housing (lotteries, HDFCs) for LMI house holds. Consult with community organizations to educate on resources that are available to LMI Homebuyers. These objectives will allow Pro Grounds to become a Kiosk or Boutique Real Estate firm specializing in help LMI's achieving the American Dream. 
The Product
Grant Research, Homeownership workshops, finding homes for LMI homebuyers and selling property. 
The Target Market
low to medium income households who have the credit, savings in order to purchase properties. Black and brown residents in nyc who are looking to purchase home or who have the ability to purchase.

Renee’s Way Inc. provides educational services regarding literacy, social emotional learning, cultural diversity instruction and leadership training. Dr. Nay’s Professional Development Workshops are theoretically designed so that participants experience a self-discovery learning process grounded in research-based literacy principles. Based upon the interactive nature of the workshops, sessions ensure that all participants have an optimally meaningful experience. Each session is conducted with intense instructional focus and active engagement. According to institutional needs, individualized programs and packages are designed and priced upon request.

Available services are two-pronged, designed for educators and 5th -12th grade students.
         
•	At the student level, interactive workshops and motivational speaking performances are available for schools and youth organizations. As a seasoned educator, Dr. Nay believes that it is essential to empower children at a young age. She published children’s literature, Sistah Girl: Step into Your Greatness (Amazon Best-Seller), and Yo Bro: Strive Toward Excellence to fill the void of quality diverse literature in today’s classrooms. Poem titles like, Sistah Hair, Flavors of People, and Black Lives Matter are meaningful topics to adolescents, especially of color populations. The books were written to help guide young adults through adolescence toward excellence by identifying their aspirations, teaching them their responsibilities as role models, and showing them how they can make a difference in the world as agents of change, while reinforcing social emotional learning and literacy skills. Workshop topics include cultural acceptance, bullying, youth activism, and self-esteem. Sessions are hands-on with the use of manipulatives like beach balls and bingo cards to keep the students cognitively engaged and motivated and accommodate learning styles and special needs. Handouts and/or published books are available for purchase. 

•	Professional development, concerning pedagogical and feminine leadership training opportunities, are offered to teachers and school support staff. Critical conversation, bias evaluation, and culturally relevant teaching are some of the available topics of study. Workshop titles include “Get Set, Ready: Reflect, Rethink, Respond…. Go!” and “Enriching Conversations with Our Rich Stories.” Dr. Nay’s book publication, “Embrace Your Power: A Sistah-to-Sistah Conversation” serves as an instructional tool that affords her readers an opportunity to self-reflect and self-empower as teachers and leaders through her poetic craft.

The founder and president of Renee’s Way Inc., Dr. Renee White aka Dr. Nay, is a former NYC DOE classroom teacher and reading specialist. She is permanently certified as a N-6 teacher, Reading Specialist, and School District Administrator. Currently, as a 25+ year college professor of teacher education, Dr. White publishes motivational poetry and instructional materials that promote acceptance, and youth and women empowerment.

At Renew'd For Life we practice a holistic approach to health and wellness, which means that we look at how all areas of the person's life are connected. Does stress on job or in your relationship(s) cause overeating? Does lack of sleep or low energy prevent you from exercising? As we work together, we will look at how all parts of connected life affect health as a whole._x000D_
We work with clients to get in touch with their body's needs because we understand that life happens, and needs will change. We want to equip people with the self-awareness to make the best decisions in any given circumstance. We believe each person is fully capable of making well-informed decisions as their own expert, not the latest magazine article or fad diet book._x000D_
We use assessment tools to assist the client to define what they value most. We'll use these visions to motivate specific goals that bring them closer to where they want to be. As a health and wellness coach, we will not dictate a diet, but together we will explore why some foods make you feel better than others and how to strategically use that feedback. Together we¿ll co-create your health goals within reasonable time frames and actionable objectives, so you know exactly what you're working toward._x000D_
Clients seek Renew¿d services for several reasons:_x000D_
Statistics show: Chronic conditions like obesity, hypertension, and diabetes are present in our population at unacceptably high and costly levels. More than 78 million American adults are obese, and more than 1 in 20 is extremely obese. About 70 million U.S. adults have hypertension with only 52 percent having the condition under control. Just over 29 million Americans have diabetes and an additional 86 million have prediabetes. The medical costs of these conditions are staggering ¿ an estimated yearly total of $147 billion for obesity, $42 billion for hypertension, and $245 billion for diabetes. _x000D_
_x000D_
One of the successful and under-utilized remedies for this these conditions is behavior change in the form of dietary and/or activity modifications. Behavior change is hard, however Renew¿d makes behavior change easier health and wellness coaching. We teach, coach, support, follow-up and maintain.
